use_cases: Displaying real-time notifications or activity feeds that appear sequentially
Showing testimonial or review carousels with smooth spring animations
Revealing product features or highlights one at a time during onboarding
Displaying chat messages or comment threads as they arrive
Presenting achievement or milestone notifications with staggered entrance
ai_summary: An animated list component that sequentially reveals items one-by-one using spring physics animations. Items fade and scale in with configurable delays, creating a smooth cascading effect ideal for notification feeds, activity streams, or testimonial carousels. Built with Framer Motion's AnimatePresence for enter/exit transitions.
